samples.name: Default
samples.description: This demo for Essential<sup>®</sup> JS2 Sankey Chart control shows the default rendering of the Sankey chart with different customized values.

samples.name: Vertical Mode
samples.description: This demo for Essential<sup>®</sup> JS2 Sankey Chart control shows the orientation sample. Sankey chart supports vertical and horizontal modes.

samples.name: Print and Export
samples.description: This demo for Essential<sup>®</sup> JS2 Sankey Chart control shows printing and exporting the chart with file name customization.
